params.prompt: Wide interior shot with a slow and smooth dolly in. Dramatic shadows crawl and shift across walls, furnishings, and architectural surfaces. Neutral white balance, balanced exposure, stable motion. Atmospheric architectural cinematography. Start with a slow dolly inward from the glass-patio opening into the living area, pause to reveal the sofa vignette, then shift focus to the standing desk near the window (brief static hold on desk). Finish with a slow reveal of the coffee table vignette and plant. Keep motion smooth and steady, highlighting texture and daylight. Nest, Calm, warm, airy Japandi — family-forward, minimal, and texturally layered. Plausible light drift from visible sources only, consistent exposure, straight architecture, stable walls and windows, premium real-estate cinematography.
params.negative_prompt: No saturated or neon colors, no heavy ornamentation, no busy patterns, avoid glossy reflective plastics or chrome, no visible text/logos, avoid unrealistic lighting (hard mixed color temps), no unsafe crib staging (no cords, no hanging items)., blur, distort, low quality, warped architecture, flicker, unstable camera, unrealistic lighting, muddy shadows, layout drift
